triggers.description: At the beginning of each upkeep, if CARDNAME is on the battlefield, each player creates a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with haste named Tombspawn for each creature card in their graveyard.
At the beginning of each end step or when CARDNAME leaves the battlefield, destroy all tokens created with CARDNAME. They can't be regenerated.
